action.reasoning: Observation: Training worked! 5 epochs in ~414s (~83s/epoch). Val AP went from 0.0759 to 0.1312, still improving strongly. Analysis: Pipeline is validated. Each epoch ~45s. With 5.72h remaining, I can do many more epochs. The model is still improving - need to train much longer. Decision: Submit eval first to get baseline score, then train for 25 more epochs (from epoch 5 checkpoint). Also consider improving architecture with virtual nodes and residual connections.
